description: Map authored game assets to store listings, IAP packs, Steam depots, and collectible registry

play.label: Google Play
play.docs: Play Console → Monetize → Products → Create product with SKU

steam.label: Steam
steam.docs: Steamworks → App Admin → Depots → upload bundle/ paths via steamcmd

itch.label: itch.io
itch.docs: itch.io → Edit game → Upload DLC / separate files per pack

registry.label: Collectible registry
registry.docs: Optional registryUri per asset — IPFS, on-chain metadata, or threshold:// pointer

storeLinkFields.storeSku: Unified SKU — Play product id, Steam DLC key, or itch file id
storeLinkFields.registryUri: Optional URI — threshold://, ipfs://, or store asset manifest

workflow: Export walkthrough → PACKS step assigns storeSku + registryUri per asset
assetRegistry.storeAssets in manifest documents rights + store mappings
npm run store:assets (or store:prep) generates play/steam/itch/registry JSON
Phase M — Steamworks SDK in Electron; depot upload uses steam-depot-assets.json
